message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first get_panes in load_distributed_remote_panes (tick 248)

Migrates the distributed remote-pane storage read in
`load_distributed_remote_panes` to the cx-first sibling:

- L10887 `storage.get_panes()` → `storage.get_panes_with_cx(&storage_cx)`
- Caller resolves `storage_cx` via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`

This is a short standalone helper function that spins up a scratch
`StorageHandle` solely to enumerate panes for distributed-mode bridging,
then shuts it down. Routing the read through the cx-first variant makes
this enumeration cancel-aware so a cx-cancel at the CLI spawn boundary
cleanly aborts the distributed bridge warmup instead of running the full
pane scan before unwinding.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 62 (187-248).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 113 sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
